LAW AND MOTION 301, DEFENDANT BERNITA GOLDSMITH'S SPECIAL DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT IS SUSTAINED WITH 10 DAYS LEAVE TO AMEND TO PLEAD THE ELEMENTS OF NEGLIGENT ENTRUSTMENT. DEFENDANTS JAVON WALKER AND BERNITA GOLDSMITH'S MOTION TO STRIKE PLAINTIFFS' FIRST AMENDED COMPLAINT AND CLAIM FOR PUNITIVE DAMAGES IS GRANTED WITH LEAVE TO AMEND TO PLEAD A BASIS FOR PUNITIVE DAMAGE.
